title: Bryan Hull
compiled_truth: Bryan Hull is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2001-12-19), Bryan Hull sent 62 and received 1432 emails, totalling 1494 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (28), [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (26), [David Baumbach](people/david-baumbach) (23), [O'Neal Winfree](people/o-neal-winfree) (15), [Michael Walters](people/michael-walters) (14). Mailbox folders observed: bammel_stg, deleted_items, enron_news, enron_power, inbox, industrials.
